title: Robinhood Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Robinhood reported record-setting full year 2024 results with exceptional performance in Q4. Q4 2024 Highlights: Revenue reached $1.01 billion, significantly exceeding analyst expectations of $849.06 million. Transaction-based revenues jumped 200% to $672 million. Crypto revenue surpassed options for the first time with $358 million, up 700% year-over-year. Options revenue reached $222 million, up 83% year-over-year. Equities contributed $61 million, up 144%. Net income surged to $916 million with benefits from $369 million deferred tax benefit and $55 million regulatory settlement reversal. Stock Performance: HOOD surged 15.3% in after-hours trading, reaching an all-time high of $64.47 per share. Full Year 2024: Record revenues of $2.951 billion, up 58.23% from 2023. Funded customers increased to 25.2 million, up 8%. Investment accounts rose to 26.2 million, up 10%. Average revenue per user doubled to $164. Net deposits reached $16.1 billion. Gold Subscribers: Reached 2.6 million by year-end, up 86% year-over-year. CEO Statement: Q4 was a record-breaking quarter that caps off a record-setting year.
